name: Justin Hill Golf Academy
address: 2520 Arkansas Valley Dr, Little Rock, AR 72212
about: Justin Hill Golf Academy is a comprehensive golf instruction facility that utilizes advanced technology to provide lessons and analysis. The venue offers both indoor and outdoor bays equipped with Trackman, GC Quad, and high-speed video technology, alongside a dedicated SAM PuttLab for putting analysis. Instruction covers full swing, short game, sports psychology, and club fitting, with a focus on data-driven improvement. The academy emphasizes professional coaching with 19 years of PGA Tour experience and positions itself as a premium destination for serious golfers looking to enhance their game through technology-based training.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced launch monitor technology including Trackman and GC Quad
Comprehensive SAM PuttLab for detailed putting analysis
Professional coaching with PGA Tour experience
Indoor and outdoor bay availability for year-round practice

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar launch monitor for ball flight analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs. The venue also offers club fitting services if you're looking to optimize your equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drink?
faq.answer: No food or drink service is mentioned at the venue. It appears to be a focused training facility without dining options.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Since this is a training facility with simulators, 18 holes would depend on your pace and whether you're taking lessons or just practicing. Typical simulator rounds range from 1-2 hours depending on play style.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Justin Hill Golf Academy offers junior golf programs and has been recognized for teaching excellence, making it suitable for young golfers looking to improve their skills.
